title: Hana's Plushies
description: Adds craftable and rare loot plush shark items. 16 for each of the colors and several pride ones.
body:
# Fill your chests with adorable squishy shark plushies! Craft and collect them all!
## For Each of the colored shark plushies
- Crafted with a single piece of string, 4 wool of any color, and the desired colored dye
![White Blahaj and Dye Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00d8e6a5d649315cdac8ec75f418f71f8fbacb02.png)
## For each of the pride shark plushies find them in treasure-filled structures
- End Cities \
![Polygender Blahaj in an End City Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b3ee3bc00d5af3beb6255071cd0937f2df8542d.png)
- Buried Treasure \
![Non-Binary Blahaj in a Treasure Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7664647d1322e49e2227550e54d6334da8800810.png)
- Mansion Chests \
![Polygender Blahaj in a Mansion Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3b6034e3a57a3dbad36092c04a95741435fd6a4.png)
- Ancient Cities \
![Bisexual Blahaj in an Ancient City Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c1fa29cb9256af2dc14a3ae956c56e8c13bd79b.png)
- Abandoned Mineshafts \
![Non-Binary Blahaj in a Minecart Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cf17669165dbe938976776e0cb5361876d89120.png)
